description: The AxisTranslationGizmo is the squares often seen on a Gizmo to translate it along 2 axies at the same time.

fields.TargetSlot: The slot to translate and edit.
fields.AutoPositionAtTargetSlot: Whether to automatically position this at the target slot.
fields._interactingComponent: the component This is interacting with.
fields._material: The material being used for the visual.
fields._toolPoint: The point that follows the interacting tool's tip.
fields._activePoint: The point that follows the gizmo visual.
fields._lineRoot: the root of the line visual from the gizmo to the interacting tool's tip.
fields._lineSegment: The segment mesh being used for the line visual.
fields._snapHighlight: the root of the snap highlight for snapping.
fields.Axis: The direction of the 2d plane this will translate along.
fields.PointSpace: The coordinate space of ``TargetPoint`` drive value.
fields.TargetPoint: A field to drive with the target point position.
fields.UseCustomVisual: Whether to use a custom visual rather than the default code generated one.
fields._customVisualRoot: The root slot of the custom visual.
fields.ArrowLength: The length of the arrow this gizmo is attached to.
fields.CreateUndoSteps: Whether to make edits done with this component undoable.
fields._visualRoot: The root slot of the visual for interaction.
fields._visualRot: The rotation field of the visual.
fields._arrowVector: The vector field of the arrow mesh visual.
fields._arrow: The arrow mesh of the visual.
fields._linesRoot: the root slot of the lines visual.
fields._line0: The segment mesh being used for the first line.
fields._line1: The segment mesh being used for the second line.
